languages.text: "Сонная вода? Хм. Знаешь, шерин, из снадобья, которое помогает забыться ночью, невзирая на пережитые днем ужасы, могло бы быть большое будущее в виде экспорта на другие миры Империума..."

traits.locale_text: "Сонная вода? Хм. Знаешь, шерин, из снадобья, которое помогает забыться ночью, невзирая на пережитые днем ужасы, могло бы быть большое будущее в виде экспорта на другие миры Империума..."
traits.speaker: JaeCompanion

languages.text: "Sleep-water? Hmm. You know, shereen, a draught that helps one forget one's terrors at night regardless of the horrors suffered during the day could have a grand future as an export to other worlds of the Imperium..."
languages.original_text: "Сонная вода? Хм. Знаешь, шерин, из снадобья, которое помогает забыться ночью, невзирая на пережитые днем ужасы, могло бы быть большое будущее в виде экспорта на другие миры Империума..."

languages.text: «¿Agua del sueño? ¿Sabe, shereen? Una bebida que ayuda a olvidar los terrores nocturnos independientemente de los horrores presenciados durante el día tendría un gran futuro como exportación a otros mundos del Imperium...».
languages.original_text: "Sleep-water? Hmm. You know, shereen, a draught that helps one forget one's terrors at night regardless of the horrors suffered during the day could have a grand future as an export to other worlds of the Imperium..."

traits.locale_text: «¿Agua del sueño? ¿Sabe, shereen? Una bebida que ayuda a olvidar los terrores nocturnos independientemente de los horrores presenciados durante el día tendría un gran futuro como exportación a otros mundos del Imperium...».

languages.text: “睡眠水？嗯。亲爱的，这样一种能让人在夜里忘却恐惧、无论白日遭受了何等惊吓都能安眠的饮品，作为出口到帝国其他世界的商品，前景可是不可估量啊……”
languages.original_text: "Sleep-water? Hmm. You know, shereen, a draught that helps one forget one's terrors at night regardless of the horrors suffered during the day could have a grand future as an export to other worlds of the Imperium..."

traits.locale_text: “睡眠水？嗯。亲爱的，这样一种能让人在夜里忘却恐惧、无论白日遭受了何等惊吓都能安眠的饮品，作为出口到帝国其他世界的商品，前景可是不可估量啊……”

languages.text: « De l'eau de sommeil ? Hmm... Vous savez, shereen, un breuvage permettant de repousser les terreurs de la nuit quelles que soient les horreurs vécues le jour, voilà qui ferait un produit d'exportation de choix pour d’autres mondes de l'Imperium... »
languages.original_text: "Sleep-water? Hmm. You know, shereen, a draught that helps one forget one's terrors at night regardless of the horrors suffered during the day could have a grand future as an export to other worlds of the Imperium..."

traits.locale_text: « De l'eau de sommeil ? Hmm... Vous savez, shereen, un breuvage permettant de repousser les terreurs de la nuit quelles que soient les horreurs vécues le jour, voilà qui ferait un produit d'exportation de choix pour d’autres mondes de l'Imperium... »

languages.text: "Uyku suyu mu? Biliyor musun şirinim... Gün boyunca çekilen dehşete rağmen geceleri insanın korkularını unutmasına yardımcı olan bir iksirin, İmparatorluk'un diğer dünyalarına ihraç edilmek bakımından büyük bir geleceği olabilir..."
languages.original_text: "Sleep-water? Hmm. You know, shereen, a draught that helps one forget one's terrors at night regardless of the horrors suffered during the day could have a grand future as an export to other worlds of the Imperium..."

traits.locale_text: "Uyku suyu mu? Biliyor musun şirinim... Gün boyunca çekilen dehşete rağmen geceleri insanın korkularını unutmasına yardımcı olan bir iksirin, İmparatorluk'un diğer dünyalarına ihraç edilmek bakımından büyük bir geleceği olabilir..."

languages.text: "Schlaf-wasser? Hmm. Wisst Ihr, Shereen, ein Gebräu, das hilft, die Schrecken der Nacht trotz der erlebten Schrecken des Tages zu vergessen, könnte auf anderen Welten des Imperiums eine große Zukunft haben ..."
languages.original_text: "Sleep-water? Hmm. You know, shereen, a draught that helps one forget one's terrors at night regardless of the horrors suffered during the day could have a grand future as an export to other worlds of the Imperium..."

traits.locale_text: "Schlaf-wasser? Hmm. Wisst Ihr, Shereen, ein Gebräu, das hilft, die Schrecken der Nacht trotz der erlebten Schrecken des Tages zu vergessen, könnte auf anderen Welten des Imperiums eine große Zukunft haben ..."

languages.text: 「睡眠水？うーん。知ってるかい、シェリーン、昼間の恐怖を忘れるのに役立つ飲み物なら、帝国の他の世界への輸出で大きな成功を収めるかもしれないわ…」
languages.original_text: "Sleep-water? Hmm. You know, shereen, a draught that helps one forget one's terrors at night regardless of the horrors suffered during the day could have a grand future as an export to other worlds of the Imperium..."
